projectDescription: A docs-as-portfolio site for Taylor McNeil, a Developer Experience Engineer, treating her career as an API—structured, versioned, and built to help developers (and hiring managers) get unstuck fast.
keyFeatures: API-metaphor portfolio treating the candidate as a versioned dependency
Career changelog with version-tagged role history (v1.0.0–v4.0.0)
Technical case studies: Stellar OpenAPI spec, tutorial methodology
Full-length guides and tutorials (HMAC auth, Java game dev, MongoDB + TanStack)
Interactive TicTacToe component embedded in tutorial
Three-panel layout mimicking API reference tools (sidebar, content, response panel)
Light/dark theme toggle with custom design system
Active build log for in-progress projects (&mpersand, DevRel Playground)
publicApiSurface: GET /quickstart — Candidate config and test output
GET /changelog — Career timeline with versioned roles
GET /tutorials/java-game-dev — Java Tic Tac Toe tutorial with interactive demo
GET /aampersand — Active build: fiction-writing creative workspace
